description: Proof generated and verified on the same logical chain (Ethereum mainnet, chainId=1) with the correct chain ID bound in the circuit public inputs. This is the happy-path case where the chain ID commitment matches the verifier's expected chain.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: publicInputs[2] = 0x1 (chainId=1) matches targetChainId. Proof is structurally valid and all invariants hold.
